queries.question: For each travel agency, provide the corresponding destination names of destinations.
queries.sql: select travel_agencies.name , destinations.destination_name from Travel_Agencies_Destinations join Destinations on Travel_Agencies_Destinations.destination_id = Destinations.id join Travel_Agencies on Travel_Agencies_Destinations.travel_agency_id = Travel_Agencies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?destination_name WHERE {
  ?travel_agencies_destinations a :Travel_Agencies_Destinations .
  ?destinations a :Destinations .
  ?travel_agencies_destinations p:destination_id ?destination_id_l .
  ?destinations p:id ?id_r .
  ?travel_agencies a :Travel_Agencies .
  ?travel_agencies_destinations p:travel_agency_id ?travel_agency_id_l .
  ?travel_agencies p:id ?id_r2 .
  ?travel_agencies p:name ?name .
  ?destinations p:destination_name ?destination_name .
  FILTER(STR(?destination_id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?travel_agency_id_l) = STR(?id_r2))
}

queries.question: Which destination name is shared by all travel agencies?
queries.sql: SELECT Destinations.destination_name  from Travel_Agencies_Destinations join Destinations on Travel_Agencies_Destinations.destination_id = Destinations.id join Travel_Agencies on Travel_Agencies_Destinations.travel_agency_id = Travel_Agencies.id   GROUP BY Travel_Agencies_Destinations.destination_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Travel_Agencies_Destinations.travel_agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Travel_Agencies)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What destination names are associated with each travel agency?
